definitions.name: prev_discharge
definitions.business_description: Previous/next value comparison using PAT_ID, HOSP_DISCH_TIME, HOSP_ADMSN_TIME
definitions.technical_expression: LAG(hosp_disch_time) OVER (PARTITION BY pat_id ORDER BY hosp_admsn_time)

definitions.name: days_since_last_discharge
definitions.business_description: Previous/next value comparison using DAY, PAT_ID, HOSP_DISCH_TIME, HOSP_ADMSN_TIME
definitions.technical_expression: DATEDIFF(day, LAG(hosp_disch_time) OVER (PARTITION BY pat_id ORDER BY hosp_admsn_time), HOSP_ADMSN_TIME)

definitions.name: filter:where:HOSP_DISCH_TIME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where hosp_disch_time is not null
